speaker: Manfred Weber
text: Beating populism requires brave leadership that defies public opinion in historic moments rather than just adding social benefits — and concretely, Europe needs a directly elected EU president and a unified European defence pillar including a European army.
context: Cited Kohl pushing through the euro despite German unpopularity, and Adenauer reconciling with France seven years after WWII; noted €6.5 trillion in planned defence spending without matching US capability.

grounded_formulations.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
